summary: Plan-only remediation classification for five open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned. No item has complete merge preflight evidence, so no merge_candidate action is emitted. One small non-security PR has a concrete repair path; one PR is routed to central security handling; one broad feature PR needs maintainer judgment; two passing PRs remain independent candidates pending normal merge preflight.

actions.reason: Repair the contributor branch narrowly before any merge recommendation.
Keep as an independent merge candidate for normal maintainer preflight; do not merge from this shard.
Feature scope plus session-state risk and unresolved/insufficiently hydrated review context require maintainer judgment before merge or repair.
Route this exact PR to central security handling; do not classify, merge, close, label, comment on, or repair this security-sensitive item from ProjectClownfish.
Keep as an independent candidate pending normal maintainer merge preflight.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair #88180 on the contributor branch before merge consideration. The current change is small and useful, but its Real behavior proof check is failing and merge preflight is incomplete.
